title: `Iyey #5863
definition:
Ije-abarim = "ruins of Abarim"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab
 2) a town in Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ije-abarim = "ruins of Abarim"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab
 2) a town in Judah

    NASB:  a place on the E. border of Moab, also a city in S. Judah
